default.heading: Escape Maze
default.body: Navigate the maze and find your way out!

default.heading: Use the Controls
default.body: Swipe or use the joystick on your phone to move through the maze.

default.heading: Race to the Exit
default.body: Find and reach the exit before other players. Faster times earn more points!

default.heading: New Maze Each Round
default.body: Every round generates a fresh maze. Memorization won't help, so stay sharp!

individual.heading: Escape Maze
individual.body: Navigate the maze and find your way out!

individual.heading: Use the Controls
individual.body: Swipe or use the joystick on your phone to move through the maze.

individual.heading: Race to the Exit
individual.body: Find and reach the exit before other players. Faster times earn more points!

individual.heading: New Maze Each Round
individual.body: Every round generates a fresh maze. Memorization won't help, so stay sharp!

team.heading: Escape Maze Team Mode
team.body: Teams of four share one maze runner, so every move needs coordination.

team.heading: One Direction Each
team.body: Every teammate gets one job: up, down, left, or right.

team.heading: Shake to Move
team.body: When your direction is needed, shake your phone to push the shared runner that way.

team.heading: Talk It Out
team.body: Call out walls, corners, and openings. The fastest coordinated team reaches the exit first.
